details.test: Task 1: Add three different organic 25kg bean products under $80 to cart
Task 2: Select high-protein product and add approximately 1 metric ton equivalent
Task 3: Buy at least 500kg (10 bags) of non-GMO beans with total <= dynamic cap
Task 4: Choose cheaper bean variety by price per kg and buy 4 bags
Task 5: Order 10 bags of black beans with shipping estimate to ZIP 75001
Task 6: Activate highest volume discount on chickpeas-like product
Task 7: Create business account and set default shipping address contact
Task 8: Submit custom quote request for 2 metric tons of soybeans from Brazil
Task 9: Build mixed cart of three bean types in 25kg bags (8 bags each)
